name: analyze
title: Reasoning, classification & valuation analysis
description: Classify a query into the category lattice / make-model normalization (constraint-propagation gate: alias/override hard constraints first, pgvector proximity second), reason over the fused comps + authoritative numbers, and emit a human-readable answer with an inspectable classification receipt. Backed by the reasoning model (MAI-Thinking-1) and the ReasoningBank (inference-time memory). Refuses to act below the confidence floor (escalates to a human instead of guessing). Anti-fabrication: every number must cite a Lot ID.

classification_receipt.description: Surfaced + editable. The legible reasoning the admin can correct.

reasoningbank_hit.description: True when a prior episode's mapping was reused ('I've seen this before').

citations.description: Lot IDs backing every number stated.

context.description: OPTIONAL external-context corroboration, fused from the external-context envelope (Docs/specs/external-context-envelope.md, Bridge Protocol). NARRATED SEPARATELY from trusted numbers — context NEVER carries a standalone fabricated valuation number. Each note is qualitative/directional and MUST be keyed on (region, period) and carry a named mechanism + n + window + source, or it is dropped (provenance-or-no-render).

caption.description: Directional, qualitative corroboration sentence — no standalone valuation number.

mechanism.description: Named causal mechanism, e.g. 'drought-driven herd liquidation lifts used-equipment supply'.

source.description: Named source: MachineryPete | noaa | crop_insurance | ffiec.

escalate.description: True when below the confidence floor — caller must defer to a human, not fabricate.
